fpm_normalize.approach: Implemented normalization by detecting overflow at bit 47, shifting right and incrementing exponent when overflow is present, then extracting the 23-bit fraction from bits 46:24, guard bit from bit 23, and sticky as the OR of remaining bits 22:0.

Implemented normalization by detecting overflow at bit 47; when overflow exists, shift the fraction right by 1 bit and increment exponent; extract guard and sticky bits from the appropriate positions based on overflow state.

Detect overflow at bit 47; when set, shift fraction right by 1 bit (from [47:25]), increment exponent, and extract guard from bit[24] and sticky from OR of bits[23:0]; when not set, extract fraction from bits[46:24], guard from bit[23], and sticky from OR of bits[22:0].

fpm_multiply.approach: Implement IEEE 754 floating-point multiplication by computing result_sign as XOR of input signs, product as 24×24-bit multiplication, and raw_exp as sum of exponents minus bias (127) to account for double-biasing.

fpm_round_pack.approach: Fixed the fraction overflow detection by using a 24-bit temporary variable to properly detect when rounding causes the 23-bit fraction to overflow (bit 23 set), rather than comparing a 23-bit value to a 24-bit constant which caused width mismatch issues.
